name: Marked Docs
_comment: Banner-forward variant for documents that carry a portion-marking or classification-style banner on every page (a leading **BANNER TEXT** line in the source — see the cui_banner feature in README.md). Restrained black-on-white palette so the banner stays the visual anchor. footer.text is empty because the banner (when present) already replaces the footer per the cui_banner behavior in md2docx.py; without a banner line this theme prints no footer at all.
